entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: या site वर amended terms post करून आम्ही कधीही Terms मध्ये बदल करू शकतो. या Terms चे periodically review करणे तुमची जबाबदारी आहे. revised Terms post झाल्यानंतर Platform चा तुमचा continued use म्हणजे तुम्ही changes accept करता आणि त्यांना agree करता. कोणतेही changes तुमच्यावर binding असल्याने तुम्ही हे page वारंवार check करणे अपेक्षित आहे. कोणत्याही revisions effective झाल्यानंतर आमच्या Service ला access किंवा use करणे सुरू ठेवल्यास, तुम्ही revised terms ने bound राहण्यास agree करता. नवीन terms मान्य नसल्यास, तुम्हाला Service use करण्याची authorization राहणार नाही.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: आम्ही collect केलेली किंवा तुम्ही दिलेली personal information disclose करू शकतो: Law Enforcement साठी disclosure: काही circumstances मध्ये law ने required असल्यास किंवा public authorities कडून valid requests आल्यास आम्हाला तुमचा Data disclose करावा लागू शकतो. Business Transaction: आमच्या subsidiaries किंवा आम्ही merger, acquisition किंवा asset sale मध्ये involved असल्यास, तुमचा Personal Data transfer होऊ शकतो. इतर cases. आम्ही तुमची information यांनाही disclose करू शकतो: आमच्या subsidiaries आणि affiliates; आमच्या business ला support करण्यासाठी वापरत असलेले contractors, service providers आणि इतर third parties; तुम्ही information दिलेल्या purpose पूर्ण करण्यासाठी; आमच्या website वर तुमच्या company चा logo include करण्यासाठी; तुम्ही information देता तेव्हा आम्ही disclose केलेल्या इतर कोणत्याही purpose साठी; इतर cases मध्ये तुमच्या consent सह; Company, आमचे customers किंवा इतरांच्या rights, property किंवा safety protect करण्यासाठी disclosure necessary किंवा appropriate आहे असे आम्हाला वाटल्यास.

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: आमची Service facilitate करण्यासाठी (“Service Providers”), आमच्या behalf वर Service provide करण्यासाठी, Service-related services perform करण्यासाठी किंवा आमची Service कशी वापरली जाते याचे analysis करण्यात मदत करण्यासाठी आम्ही third party companies आणि individuals employ करू शकतो. या third parties ना फक्त आमच्या behalf वर ही tasks perform करण्यासाठी तुमच्या Personal Data ला access असतो आणि इतर कोणत्याही purpose साठी तो disclose किंवा use न करण्याची त्यांची obligation असते.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: आम्ही Service मध्ये paid products आणि/किंवा services provide करू शकतो. अशा वेळी payment processing साठी आम्ही third-party services वापरतो (उदा. payment processors). आम्ही तुमचे payment card details store किंवा collect करणार नाही. ती information थेट आमच्या third-party payment processors कडे दिली जाते आणि तुमच्या personal information चा त्यांचा use त्यांच्या Privacy Policy ने governed असतो. हे payment processors PCI Security Standards Council ने managed केलेल्या PCI-DSS standards चे पालन करतात; हा Visa, Mastercard, American Express आणि Discover सारख्या brands चा joint effort आहे. PCI-DSS requirements payment information चे secure handling सुनिश्चित करण्यात मदत करतात.

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: आमच्या sole discretion अंतर्गत, कोणत्याही reason साठी आणि limitation शिवाय, Terms च्या breach सह पण त्यापुरते मर्यादित नसून, आम्ही prior notice किंवा liability शिवाय तुमचे account terminate किंवा suspend करू शकतो आणि Service access त्वरित bar करू शकतो. तुम्हाला तुमचे account terminate करायचे असल्यास, तुम्ही Service वापरणे simply discontinue करू शकता. Terms मधील ज्या provisions त्यांच्या nature मुळे termination नंतरही survive व्हायला हव्यात त्या survive होतील, यात ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity आणि limitations of liability यांचा limitation शिवाय समावेश आहे.

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: आम्ही वेळोवेळी आमची Privacy Policy update करू शकतो. या page वर new Privacy Policy post करून आम्ही कोणत्याही changes बद्दल तुम्हाला notify करू. change effective होण्यापूर्वी email आणि/किंवा आमच्या Service वरील prominent notice द्वारे तुम्हाला कळवू आणि या Privacy Policy च्या शीर्षस्थानी “effective date” update करू. कोणत्याही changes साठी तुम्ही ही Privacy Policy periodically review करावी अशी सूचना आहे. या Privacy Policy मधील changes या page वर post झाल्यावर effective होतात.

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.

entries.value: आमच्या Service चा development process automate करण्यासाठी आम्ही third-party Service Providers वापरू शकतो.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: आम्ही इतरांच्या intellectual property rights चा आदर करतो. Service वर post केलेला Content कोणत्याही person किंवा entity च्या copyright किंवा इतर intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) चे infringement करतो असा कोणताही claim आल्यास त्याला respond करणे ही आमची policy आहे. तुम्ही copyright owner असाल किंवा त्यांच्या behalf वर authorized असाल आणि copyrighted work copyright infringement ठरेल अशा पद्धतीने copy केले गेले आहे असे तुम्हाला वाटत असल्यास, कृपया support@inspir.app वर email द्वारे तुमचा claim submit करा, subject line: “Copyright Infringement” ठेवा आणि खाली “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” अंतर्गत detailed केल्याप्रमाणे alleged Infringement चे detailed description include करा. तुमच्या copyright वरील Service वर आणि/किंवा Service द्वारे आढळलेल्या कोणत्याही Content च्या infringement बाबत misrepresentation किंवा bad-faith claims साठी तुम्हाला damages (costs आणि attorneys’ fees सहित) साठी accountable धरले जाऊ शकते.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: आमच्या Service वरील activity track करण्यासाठी आम्ही cookies आणि similar tracking technologies वापरतो आणि काही information hold करतो. Cookies या लहान amount of data असलेल्या files असतात ज्यात anonymous unique identifier असू शकतो. Cookies website कडून तुमच्या browser ला पाठवले जातात आणि तुमच्या device वर stored होतात. information collect आणि track करण्यासाठी तसेच आमची Service improve आणि analyze करण्यासाठी beacons, tags आणि scripts सारख्या इतर tracking technologies देखील वापरल्या जातात. तुम्ही तुमच्या browser ला सर्व cookies refuse करण्यास किंवा cookie पाठवली जात असताना indicate करण्यास सांगू शकता. तथापि, cookies accept न केल्यास तुम्हाला आमच्या Service चे काही portions वापरता येणार नाहीत. आम्ही वापरत असलेल्या Cookies ची examples: Session Cookies: आमची Service operate करण्यासाठी आम्ही Session Cookies वापरतो. Preference Cookies: तुमच्या preferences आणि विविध settings लक्षात ठेवण्यासाठी आम्ही Preference Cookies वापरतो. Security Cookies: security purposes साठी आम्ही Security Cookies वापरतो. Advertising Cookies: तुम्हाला आणि तुमच्या interests शी relevant असू शकतील अशा advertisements serve करण्यासाठी Advertising Cookies वापरल्या जातात.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: आम्ही आपल्या planet बाहेर गेलो. मात्र, सर्वात rapid आणि significant advancement communication आणि technology मध्ये झाली, ज्याने 3 billion पेक्षा जास्त लोकसंख्या असलेल्या global population ला connect केले.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: या Privacy Policy मध्ये set out केलेल्या purposes साठी आवश्यक असेपर्यंतच आम्ही तुमचा Personal Data retain करू. आमच्या legal obligations comply करण्यासाठी (उदा. applicable laws comply करण्यासाठी तुमचा data retain करणे required असल्यास), disputes resolve करण्यासाठी, आणि आमचे legal agreements व policies enforce करण्यासाठी necessary extent पर्यंत आम्ही तुमचा Personal Data retain आणि use करू. internal analysis purposes साठी Usage Data देखील retain करू. Usage Data सामान्यतः shorter period साठी retain केला जातो, except हा data security strengthen करण्यासाठी किंवा आमच्या Service ची functionality improve करण्यासाठी वापरला जात असेल, किंवा longer time periods साठी हा data retain करण्याची legal obligation आमच्यावर असेल.

entries.source: Welcome to Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) (“Company”, “we”, “our”, “us”)! Our Privacy Policy also governs your use of our Service and explains how we collect, safeguard and disclose information that results from your use of our web pages. The privacy policy is available at inspir.app/privacy Your agreement with us includes these Terms and our Privacy Policy (“Agreements”). You acknowledge that you have read and understood the Agreements, and agree to be bound of them. If you do not agree with (or cannot comply with) Agreements, then you may not use the Service, but please let us know by emailing support@inspir.appso we can try to find a solution. These Terms apply to all visitors, users and others who wish to access or use the Service.

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: तुम्ही आमच्यासोबत account तयार करता तेव्हा तुम्ही provide केलेली information नेहमी accurate, complete आणि current आहे याची guarantee देता. inaccurate, incomplete किंवा obsolete information मुळे Service वरील तुमचे account त्वरित terminate होऊ शकते. तुमच्या computer आणि/किंवा account च्या access वर restriction यासह पण त्यापुरते मर्यादित नसून, तुमच्या account आणि password ची confidentiality maintain करण्यासाठी तुम्ही responsible आहात. तुमचा password आमच्या Service सोबत असो किंवा third-party service सोबत, तुमच्या account आणि/किंवा password अंतर्गत होणाऱ्या कोणत्याही आणि सर्व activities किंवा actions ची responsibility accept करण्यास तुम्ही agree करता. security breach किंवा तुमच्या account चा unauthorized use कळताच तुम्ही आम्हाला immediately notify केले पाहिजे. तुम्ही username म्हणून दुसऱ्या person किंवा entity चे name किंवा lawfully available नसलेले name, किंवा योग्य authorization शिवाय तुमच्याशिवाय दुसऱ्या person किंवा entity च्या rights अंतर्गत असलेले name किंवा trademark वापरू शकत नाही. offensive, vulgar किंवा obscene असलेले कोणतेही name username म्हणून वापरू शकत नाही. आमच्या sole discretion मध्ये service refuse करणे, accounts terminate करणे, content remove किंवा edit करणे, किंवा orders cancel करण्याचा right आम्ही reserve करतो.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: तुम्ही AI मध्ये notes paste करता तेव्हा broad ideas त्या jobs मध्ये split करायला सांगा. प्रत्येकात पूर्ण paragraph असलेल्या 5 giant cards पेक्षा 18 specific cards असलेला deck साधारणपणे चांगला असतो.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: आमची Service वापरताना आम्ही पुढील information देखील collect करू शकतो: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, place of residence व actual address वरील registration, telephone number (work, mobile), education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements वरील documents चे details, bonuses आणि compensation वरील information, marital status, family members, social security (किंवा इतर taxpayer identification) number, office location आणि इतर data. Payment Data. तुम्ही purchases केल्यास तुमचे payment process करण्यासाठी आवश्यक data आम्ही collect करू शकतो, जसे तुमचा payment instrument number (उदा. credit card number), आणि तुमच्या payment instrument शी associated security code. सर्व payment data Razorpay कडे stored असतो. त्यांचे privacy notice link(s) येथे मिळू शकतात: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: आमची Service वापरताना, तुम्हाला contact किंवा identify करण्यासाठी वापरता येईल अशी certain personally identifiable information (“Personal Data”) आम्ही मागू शकतो. Personally identifiable information मध्ये खालील गोष्टी समाविष्ट असू शकतात, पण त्यापुरते मर्यादित नाहीत: Student आणि Parent चा email address, Student आणि Parent चे first name आणि last name, Student आणि Parent चा phone number, Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City, School name, Class, Cookies आणि Usage Data. तुम्हाला रुचू शकतील अशा newsletters, marketing किंवा promotional materials आणि इतर information सह contact करण्यासाठी आम्ही तुमचा Data वापरू शकतो. unsubscribe link follow करून तुम्ही आमच्याकडून अशा communications पैकी कोणतीही किंवा सर्व receive करणे opt-out करू शकता. Usage Data, तुम्ही आमची Service visit करता किंवा कोणत्याही device द्वारे Service access करता तेव्हा तुमचा browser पाठवतो ती information (“Usage Data”) देखील आम्ही collect करू शकतो. या Usage Data मध्ये तुमच्या computer चा Internet Protocol address (उदा. IP address), browser type, browser version, तुम्ही visit केलेली आमच्या Service ची pages, तुमच्या visit ची time आणि date, त्या pages वर spent time, unique device identifiers आणि इतर diagnostic data अशी information समाविष्ट असू शकते. device सह Service access करताना, या Usage Data मध्ये तुम्ही वापरत असलेल्या device चा type, तुमचा device unique ID, तुमच्या device चा IP address, तुमचे device operating system, तुम्ही वापरत असलेल्या Internet browser चा type, unique device identifiers आणि इतर diagnostic data अशी information समाविष्ट असू शकते.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: World History प्रत्येक काळात picture पासून zoom out करण्यासारखी राहिली आहे, आणि ती picture सतत बदलत राहिली. 19व्या century पर्यंत पोहोचणाऱ्या centuries ने human history मधील turning point दाखवला, कारण जगाने flat, limited view पासून new territories आणि colonies च्या वाढत्या understanding कडे वाटचाल केली. French Revolution ही पहिली वेळ होती जेव्हा मोठी population protest करण्यासाठी आणि liberty, equality व fraternity चे ideals establish करण्यासाठी एकत्र आली. World War II च्या events ने पुढील century साठी जग घडवले आणि 21st century ची foundation ठेवली.

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: हो, पण recommended workflow hint-first आहे. final answer copy करण्याऐवजी method समजण्यासाठी, तुमचे work check करण्यासाठी आणि errors review करण्यासाठी ते वापरा.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: हो, जेव्हा ते hints देते, reasoning तपासते, mistakes स्पष्ट करते आणि final answer तुमच्यासाठी लिहिण्याऐवजी तुम्हालाच तयार करायला सांगते.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: हो. {value1} {value2} येथे public guest learning mode म्हणून उघडते, त्यामुळे account तयार करण्यापूर्वी तुम्ही काही free guest messages ने सुरू करू शकता.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: हो. चांगला workflow म्हणजे trusted lesson source कडून foundation शिकणे, मग follow-up questions विचारण्यासाठी, recall practise करण्यासाठी, misconceptions repair करण्यासाठी आणि पुढे काय review करायचे ते plan करण्यासाठी inspir वापरणे.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: हो. use case, content needs आणि funding path स्पष्ट झाल्यावर school public modes test करून सुरू करू शकते, मग pilot किंवा tailored deployment कडे जाऊ शकते.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: हो. Audience pages फक्त public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths आणि AI-readable discovery files ना link करतात. Private saved chats excluded राहतात.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: हो. Category pages public guest modes, learning paths आणि article clusters मध्ये link करतात, त्यामुळे learners reading पासून tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning किंवा feedback कडे जाऊ शकतात.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: हो. Code Tutor concepts explain करू शकतो, examples मधून चालू शकतो, behavior predict करायला सांगू शकतो आणि learning ला copy-paste न बनवता तुम्हाला practice करायला मदत करू शकतो.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: हो. Exam Prep Planner तुमचे topics, date आणि available time practical revision sequence मध्ये बदलू शकतो, practice आणि review सह.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: हो. custom deployment बद्दल चर्चा करण्यापूर्वी Public guest modes teachers ना learning behavior test करू देतात.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: हो. Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards आणि writing feedback सारखे Public guest modes थेट उघडतात.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: हो. Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes आणि flashcards सारखे Public guest modes canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs वरून थेट उघडतात.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: हो. Public mode URLs guest mode मध्ये थेट उघडतात, त्यामुळे learner लगेच सुरू करू शकतो, मग saved history किंवा अधिक usage हवे असल्यास नंतर account तयार करू शकतो.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: हो. Public modes school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects आणि personal study routines साठी काम करतात.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: हो. Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes आणि flashcards सारखे public topic chats थेट guest mode मध्ये उघडतात.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: हो. /chat/learn-anything आणि /chat/socratic-instruction सारखे Public topic entrypoints indexable learning pages म्हणून intended आहेत.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: हो. Quiz, Flashcard Builder आणि Spaced Review हे active recall आणि mistake repair साठी design केलेले public modes आहेत.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: हो. Reading Companion passages simplify करू शकतो, questions विचारू शकतो, vocabulary explain करू शकतो आणि main claim व supporting evidence identify करायला मदत करू शकतो.
